description_long: This kiosk features a modern, angular design with a combination of white and gray panels accented by wood slats forming a partial open roof. The front displays prominent branding for SNC-Lavalin and ATKINS, with a digital screen and interactive counter area for visitors. The left side includes a geometric wall with a slanted accent and a small display shelf, while the right side is more enclosed with a clean, minimalist surface. The rear is mostly solid, providing privacy and structural support, and the open roof slats allow natural light to filter in. The interior includes pendant lighting and a counter, suggesting a space for customer interaction or information dissemination. The overall structure is sleek, professional, and designed for high-traffic urban environments such as trade shows or public plazas.
description: A sleek, modern kiosk with white and gray panels, wood slat roof accents, and prominent branding, featuring a digital screen and interactive counter at the front.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, digital screen, branding, and geometric wall accents.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the interactive counter, digital display, and enclosed right wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the mostly solid back wall and partial view of the wood slat roof.
description_view_3: Left-side view revealing the interior counter, pendant lighting, and geometric wall design.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage on upper front and side panels, with visible text: 'SNC-LAVALIN' and 'ATKINS'.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open entryway at the front, no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with open horizontal wood slats, providing partial cover and decorative effect.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and geometric influences.
